Minimum suggested crew size: one utilitiesman and one laborer.

Notes:
1. The installation of valves and fittings includes unloading, placing, caulking and leading, welding, and bolting
flanges. It also includes installing gaskets, packing, hand wheels, and trim.
2. PVC solvent will not work with CPVC piping. Each materiel must have its own solvent cement.
3. Types of plastic pipe:
a. PVC. Used with water, gas, and drainage systems, but not with hot water systems
b. CPVC. Similar to PVC, but designed for piping water up to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
